title: StructureArchetype
description: Schema for Structure Ascriptions — the foundational aggregate. Defines the Structure's purpose: its identity discriminator and governance address. DM input = DM output (1:1). Tenant-defined archetypes extending Structure MUST reference this schema via allOf.

purpose.description: The Structure's raison d'être. Globally unique among in-effect Structures — serves as both identity discriminator and governance address. Directives reference the purpose via their purpose field.
